content.json:
## ATO Logging Validation
Validates every architecture component from the Azure Gov landing zone is sending logs to Sentinel.  
✅ **Ingesting** = active data flow  |  ✅ **Configured - No Activity** = logging enabled, no events occurred (ATO Pass)  |  ❌ **Not Configured** = enable connector (ATO Finding)

parameters.name: TimeRange
parameters.label: Time Range
parameters.jsonData: [{"value": "1d", "label": "Last 1 day"}, {"value": "3d", "label": "Last 3 days"}, {"value": "7d", "label": "Last 7 days"}, {"value": "14d", "label": "Last 14 days", "selected": true}, {"value": "30d", "label": "Last 30 days"}, {"value": "90d", "label": "Last 90 days"}]

parameters.name: SelectedComponent
parameters.label: Workload

    (AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == "VAULTS" and Category == "CoreAzureBackup" | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='CoreAzureBackup'),

    (AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == "VAULTS" and Category == "AddonAzureBackupProtectedInstance" | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='AddonAzureBackupProtectedInstance'),
    (AzureBackupOperations | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='AzureBackupOperations'),
    (ASRJobs | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='ASRJobs'),
    (AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == "VAULTS" and Category == "AzureSiteRecoveryJobs" | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='ASRJobs'),
    (ASRReplicatedItems | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='ASRReplicatedItems'),
    (AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == "VAULTS" and Category == "AzureSiteRecoveryReplicatedItems" | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='ASRReplicatedItems'),
    (DataTransferOperations | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='DataTransferOperations'),
    (AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == "SEARCHSERVICES" | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='AzDiag_SEARCHSERVICES'),
    (AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == "VPNGATEWAYS" | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='AzDiag_VPNGATEWAYS'),
    (AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL'),
    (NTANetAnalytics | where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange}) | take 1 | project CheckId='NTANetAnalytics')
| distinct CheckId;
Filtered
| extend TableInSchema = SentinelTable in (SchemaCheck)
| extend HasData = CheckId in (DataCheck)
| extend State = case(HasData, 'Ingesting', TableInSchema, 'Configured', 'NotConfigured')
| summarize Ingesting=countif(State=='Ingesting'), Configured=countif(State=='Configured'), NotConfigured=countif(State=='NotConfigured')
| extend Total = Ingesting + Configured + NotConfigured
| extend Coverage = strcat(round(todouble(Ingesting) / Total * 100, 0), '%')
| project ['\u2705 Ingesting']=Ingesting, ['\u2705 Configured']=Configured, ['\u274c Not Configured']=NotConfigured, Total, ['Coverage %']=Coverage

Expected
| join kind=leftouter (DataCheck) on CheckId
| extend TableInSchema = SentinelTable in (SchemaCheck)
| extend State = case(isnotnull(Last), 'Ingesting', TableInSchema, 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| distinct Workload, CheckId, State
| summarize ['Ingesting']=countif(State=='Ingesting'), ['Configured']=countif(State=='Configured'), ['Not Configured']=countif(State=='Not Configured') by Workload
| sort by ['Not Configured'] desc, Workload asc

Expected
| join kind=leftouter (DataCheck) on CheckId
| extend TableInSchema = SentinelTable in (SchemaCheck)
| extend ConfigStatus = case(
    isnotnull(Last), 'Ingesting',
    TableInSchema, 'Configured - No Activity',
    'Not Configured')
| extend ATOStatus = case(ConfigStatus == 'Not Configured', 'Finding', 'Pass')
| extend LastSeen = case(
    isnotnull(Last), format_datetime(Last, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'),
    TableInSchema, 'schema only, no data in range',
    'not in workspace')
| extend ActualTable = case(isnotempty(DataSrc), DataSrc, SentinelTable)
| extend Source = case(
    isnotempty(SourceSub), SourceSub,
    'No Data')
| where '{SelectedComponent}' == 'All' or Workload == '{SelectedComponent}'
| where '{SelectedFamily}' == 'All' or Controls has '{SelectedFamily}'
| where '{SelectedTableFilter}' == '' or SentinelTable contains '{SelectedTableFilter}'
| where '{SelectedStatus}' == 'All' or ConfigStatus has '{SelectedStatus}'
| extend _fam = strcat(
    iff(Controls has 'AC-', 'Access Control, ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'AU-', 'Audit & Accountability, ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'CM-', 'Config Management, ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'CP-', 'Contingency Planning, ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'IA-', 'Identification & Auth, ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'IR-', 'Incident Response, ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'RA-', 'Risk Assessment, ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'SC-', 'System & Comms Protection, ', ''),
    iff(Controls has 'SI-', 'System & Info Integrity, ', ''))
| extend ['Control Family'] = trim_end(', ', _fam)
| extend _sort = case(ConfigStatus has 'Not', 0, ConfigStatus has 'Configured', 1, 2)
| sort by _sort asc, Workload asc, DisplayName asc
| project Workload, Source, ['Table']=ActualTable, ['Configuration Status']=ConfigStatus, ['ATO Status']=ATOStatus, ['Last Record']=LastSeen, ['Control Family'], ['NIST 800-53']=Controls, ['Enable']=EnableLink, ResourceFilter
content.title: Table Ingestion Status

content.query:
{SelectedTable}
| where '{SelectedResourceFilter}' == '' or column_ifexists('ResourceType', '') == '{SelectedResourceFilter}'
| where TimeGenerated > ago({TimeRange})
| top 50 by TimeGenerated desc
